transferable_mechanism: Reference-based spatial abundance modeling can serve as a contrastive mechanism when comparing niche representation against dedicated composition models.
compatibility_gaps: only supporting comparator for mechanism analysis; not a foundation model; requires matched reference and deconvolution validation
reviewer_notes: Comparator-only role accepted.

transferable_mechanism: Bayesian count-mixture deconvolution can inspire exploratory transfer to non-Visium spatial assays whose locations remain mixed cell-type signals.
compatibility_gaps: requires matched or defensible single-cell reference; new assay geometry needs validation; abundance estimates cannot be assumed benchmark-backed
reviewer_notes: Bayesian deconvolution is a legitimate exploratory path with explicit geometry caveat.

transferable_mechanism: Pretrained cell embeddings can be used as exploratory feature extractors for rare representation-transfer tasks.
compatibility_gaps: independent third-party benchmarks limited; embeddings do not provide causal proof; downstream validation required
reviewer_notes: Feature extraction only; no causal inference.

transferable_mechanism: Transition-kernel composition and absorbing-state probability can transfer as exploratory fate-hypothesis machinery when a credible kernel exists.
compatibility_gaps: requires transition kernel, pseudotime, velocity, or other justified dynamics; UMAP alone is insufficient
reviewer_notes: Markov-fate mapping is valid only with a real kernel.

transferable_mechanism: Reference-trained classifier confidence can transfer as an exploratory label-similarity mechanism for cross-tissue atlas annotation hypotheses.
compatibility_gaps: requires curated reference model; domain shift and label granularity must be validated; classifier confidence is not biological certainty
reviewer_notes: Classifier confidence is useful only as an exploratory similarity signal.

transferable_mechanism: Artificial-doublet generation can transfer as an exploratory synthetic-positive anomaly scoring mechanism.
compatibility_gaps: requires task-specific synthetic positive generator and threshold validation; not a generic QC detector
reviewer_notes: Anomaly scoring only, not generic QC.

transferable_mechanism: Embedding-level correction can transfer as a fast exploratory cross-sample alignment prototype when raw-count generative modeling is not required.
compatibility_gaps: requires precomputed high-quality embedding; cannot infer raw count corrections; alignment must be validated against biology preservation
reviewer_notes: Embedding-level correction is valid for fast alignment prototypes only.

transferable_mechanism: Additive perturbation-effect linear decomposition can provide a conservative treatment/control response baseline.
compatibility_gaps: requires explicit perturbation labels; nonlinear epistasis or multimodal responses must be caveated
reviewer_notes: Accepted as exploratory native mechanism. Must state that strong nonlinear epistasis, multimodal responses, or complex modern perturbation designs can invalidate the linear additive model.

transferable_mechanism: Shared sparse latent factors may carry perturbation-driven coordinated shifts across matched omics layers.
compatibility_gaps: requires strictly matched cells or samples across omics layers and careful factor interpretation
reviewer_notes: Accepted as exploratory multi-view perturbation hypothesis. Requires matched multi-omics and cannot claim benchmark-backed perturbation performance.

transferable_mechanism: Fused Gromov-Wasserstein coupling can suggest spatial-to-single-cell or cross-modality mapping hypotheses.
compatibility_gaps: requires manually tuned fused cost matrix over spatial physical distance and omics similarity
reviewer_notes: Exploratory architecture is plausible but high skill. Requires manual joint-cost design and validation data before scientific interpretation.

transferable_mechanism: Niche-aware embeddings can inspire exploratory spatial microenvironment representation hypotheses.
compatibility_gaps: must not replace deconvolution tools; spatial embedding does not equal abundance estimate; validation required
reviewer_notes: Spatial niche representation is exploratory only.

transferable_mechanism: AnnData-centered workflow utilities may support migration prototypes but do not constitute a single transferable algorithm.
compatibility_gaps: toolkit not a single algorithm; benchmark claims must be function-specific; avoid treating as migration source mechanism
reviewer_notes: Toolkit-level utilities are not an algorithmic migration source.

transferable_mechanism: Zero-shot foundation-model embeddings may be used as features to inspect perturbation-associated representation drift.
compatibility_gaps: causal regulatory network inference is not supported by representation drift alone; fine-tuning and validation are required
reviewer_notes: Accepted as feature-extraction hypothesis only. Hard block any claim that zero-shot embeddings directly recover causal gene regulatory networks.

transferable_mechanism: Simulation-based anomaly scoring may transfer if task-specific synthetic positive artifacts can be generated.
compatibility_gaps: requires an external custom artifact simulator and threshold validation for the target artifact
reviewer_notes: Accepted as exploratory simulation mechanism. Main blocker is a biologically grounded simulator for the rare artifact class.

transferable_mechanism: Splicing kinetic directionality can transfer only as an exploratory dynamic-state hypothesis when spliced/unspliced layers are present.
compatibility_gaps: requires spliced/unspliced layers; kNN smoothing and kinetic assumptions can distort direction; not valid for ordinary expression-only matrices
reviewer_notes: Strict layer requirement preserved.

transferable_mechanism: Deep latent-variable modeling can transfer as exploratory probabilistic multi-view representation when uncertainty and covariates matter.
compatibility_gaps: black-box model; requires training diagnostics; not automatically interpretable or benchmark-backed for migration target
reviewer_notes: Need explicit subclass and loss definition before acceptance.

transferable_mechanism: Anchor or WNN matching ideas can transfer as exploratory cross-sample or cross-modal alignment hypotheses.
compatibility_gaps: version-specific workflow; claims must specify anchor/WNN scope; not a single fixed algorithmic guarantee
reviewer_notes: Seurat should be scoped to anchor/WNN matching, not broad superiority claims.

transferable_mechanism: Reference-correlation scoring can transfer as an exploratory label-similarity mechanism for cross-tissue atlas problems when no directly matched annotator exists.
compatibility_gaps: requires trusted reference atlas; label hierarchy and domain shift must be checked; unseen states remain weak
reviewer_notes: Reference-correlation scoring is exploratory only and must not be treated as a deterministic classifier.

transferable_mechanism: Background-profile subtraction may transfer by mapping empty droplets to empty or off-tissue spatial spots.
compatibility_gaps: requires spatial background spots, lateral diffusion checks, and marker preservation validation
reviewer_notes: Accepted as exploratory contamination-modeling route. Must reinterpret empty droplets as spatial background spots and validate marker preservation.

transferable_mechanism: Smooth GAM regression can transfer to perturbation response only when perturbation is ordered by dose, time, or another continuous covariate.
compatibility_gaps: requires ordered dose or time covariate; block unordered discrete KO labels from using this mechanism
reviewer_notes: Strong-condition exploratory accept. Only valid for continuous gradient or time-exposure perturbation designs; forbid direct use for unordered discrete perturbation classes.

transferable_mechanism: Temporal transport coupling may be usable only after RNA and ATAC are projected into a shared co-embedding state space.
compatibility_gaps: wot cannot directly transport across heterogeneous RNA and ATAC spaces; require co-embedding such as WNN or another shared manifold first
reviewer_notes: Rejected as direct mechanism and locked for revision. Add mandatory co-embedding precondition before any exploratory Waddington-OT migration hypothesis is surfaced.
